name: Build NEW YOU APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build web app
        run: npm run build

      - name: Set up Java 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Set up Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

      - name: Add Capacitor Android platform
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "android" ]; then
            npx cap add android
          else
            echo "Android platform already exists"
          fi

      - name: Sync Capacitor
        run: npx cap sync android

      # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
      # WIDGET INJECTION — copies all files, patches manifest, fixes MainActivity
      # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

      - name: Copy widget Java files
        run: |
          JAVA="android/app/src/main/java/com/newyou/app"
          mkdir -p "$JAVA"
          cp widget/java/NewYouWidget.java          "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/QuestsWidget.java          "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/QuestsWidgetService.java   "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/QuestsWidgetFactory.java   "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/HabitCompleteReceiver.java "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/ProgressWidget.java        "$JAVA/"
          cp widget/java/WidgetPlugin.java          "$JAVA/"

      - name: Copy widget resource files
        run: |
          mkdir -p android/app/src/main/res/layout
          mkdir -p android/app/src/main/res/xml
          mkdir -p android/app/src/main/res/drawable

          cp widget/res/layout/widget_status.xml      android/app/src/main/res/layout/
          cp widget/res/layout/widget_quests.xml      android/app/src/main/res/layout/
          cp widget/res/layout/widget_quest_item.xml  android/app/src/main/res/layout/
          cp widget/res/layout/widget_progress.xml    android/app/src/main/res/layout/

          cp widget/res/xml/widget_status_info.xml    android/app/src/main/res/xml/
          cp widget/res/xml/widget_quests_info.xml    android/app/src/main/res/xml/
          cp widget/res/xml/widget_progress_info.xml  android/app/src/main/res/xml/

          cp widget/res/drawable/widget_background.xml  android/app/src/main/res/drawable/
          cp widget/res/drawable/widget_rank_bg.xml     android/app/src/main/res/drawable/
          cp widget/res/drawable/widget_xp_progress.xml android/app/src/main/res/drawable/
          cp widget/res/drawable/widget_hp_progress.xml android/app/src/main/res/drawable/
          cp widget/res/drawable/widget_habit_btn.xml   android/app/src/main/res/drawable/

      - name: Patch AndroidManifest.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
          path = "android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml"
          with open(path, "r") as f:
              content = f.read()

          if "NewYouWidget" in content:
              print("Already patched — skipping")
              exit(0)

          injection = """
              <!-- ══ NEW YOU WIDGETS ══ -->

              <receiver android:name=".NewYouWidget" android:exported="true">
                  <intent-filter>
                      <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE" />
                  </intent-filter>
                  <meta-data
                      android:name="android.appwidget.provider"
                      android:resource="@xml/widget_status_info" />
              </receiver>

              <receiver android:name=".QuestsWidget" android:exported="true">
                  <intent-filter>
                      <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE" />
                  </intent-filter>
                  <meta-data
                      android:name="android.appwidget.provider"
                      android:resource="@xml/widget_quests_info" />
              </receiver>

              <receiver android:name=".ProgressWidget" android:exported="true">
                  <intent-filter>
                      <action android:name="android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE" />
                  </intent-filter>
                  <meta-data
                      android:name="android.appwidget.provider"
                      android:resource="@xml/widget_progress_info" />
              </receiver>

              <receiver android:name=".HabitCompleteReceiver" android:exported="false">
                  <intent-filter>
                      <action android:name="com.newyou.app.COMPLETE_HABIT" />
                  </intent-filter>
              </receiver>

              <service
                  android:name=".QuestsWidgetService"
                  android:exported="false"
                  android:permission="android.permission.BIND_REMOTEVIEWS" />
          """

          content = content.replace("</application>", injection + "\n    </application>")

          with open(path, "w") as f:
              f.write(content)

          print("AndroidManifest.xml patched successfully")
          PYEOF

      - name: Overwrite MainActivity to register WidgetPlugin
        run: |
          cat > "android/app/src/main/java/com/newyou/app/MainActivity.java" << 'JAVA_EOF'
package com.newyou.app;

import android.os.Bundle;
import com.getcapacitor.BridgeActivity;

public class MainActivity extends BridgeActivity {
    @Override
    public void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
        registerPlugin(WidgetPlugin.class);
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
    }
}
JAVA_EOF

      # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
      # END WIDGET INJECTION
      # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

      - name: Install ImageMagick
        run: sudo apt-get install -y imagemagick

      - name: Generate all icon sizes
        run: |
          declare -A SIZES
          SIZES[mipmap-mdpi]=48
          SIZES[mipmap-hdpi]=72
          SIZES[mipmap-xhdpi]=96
          SIZES[mipmap-xxhdpi]=144
          SIZES[mipmap-xxxhdpi]=192

          for dir in "${!SIZES[@]}"; do
            size="${SIZES[$dir]}"
            dest="android/app/src/main/res/${dir}"
            mkdir -p "$dest"
            convert icon.png -resize ${size}x${size} "$dest/ic_launcher.png"
            convert icon.png -resize ${size}x${size} "$dest/ic_launcher_round.png"
            convert icon.png -resize ${size}x${size} "$dest/ic_launcher_foreground.png"
          done

          rm -rf android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-anydpi-v26
          mkdir -p android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-anydpi-v26

          cat > android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher.xml << 'EOF'
          <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
          <adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
              <background android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher_foreground"/>
              <foreground android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher_foreground"/>
          </adaptive-icon>
          EOF
          cat > android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher_round.xml << 'EOF'
          <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
          <adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
              <background android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher_foreground"/>
              <foreground android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher_foreground"/>
          </adaptive-icon>
          EOF

      - name: Set app name to NEW YOU
        run: |
          sed -i 's/android:label="[^"]*"/android:label="NEW YOU"/g' \
            android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml

      - name: Make Gradle executable
        run: chmod +x android/gradlew

      - name: Build debug APK
        run: |
          cd android
          ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon

      - name: Rename APK
        run: |
          find android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/ -name "*.apk" \
            -exec mv {} android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/newyou.apk \;

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: NewYou-APK
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/newyou.apk
          retention-days: 30
